header.title: Settings
header.subtitle: Manage your workspace preferences and system configuration.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface.
preferences.languagesDescription: Set your preferred display language for the interface.
preferences.languageHelp: Changes apply instantly and are saved for your next visit.
preferences.appearanceDescription: Customize how the platform looks on your screen.
preferences.accessibilityDescription: Optimize the interface for better readability and reach.
preferences.checkoutDescription: Configure keyboard completion and payment behavior for POS checkout.
preferences.manualTenderedLabel: Require cashier to enter tendered amount
preferences.manualTenderedDescription: When off, completing a sale auto-uses exact cash (tendered = total).

users.title: User Management
users.description: Create, edit, and manage system users. Control access permissions and monitor account status.
users.createFirstUser: Create your first user to get started
users.enterPasswordToConfirm: Enter your password to confirm deletion of user:
users.onlyOwnersManagers: Only owners and managers can access this page.
